得不到重用的英格兰第五级别联赛球队布罗姆利的华国球员秦业，此刻正打着哈欠坐在球队替补席上，

球队主力重伤，教练无人可用，打算一直摆烂一直爽的秦业突然获得了传说中的扭转乾坤系统，

【叮，只要你获得上场机会，系统就会奖励随机足球技能，你将有机会获得18岁的罗纳尔多射术、18岁的罗纳尔迪尼奥的蝎子摆尾过人、18岁的C罗脚后跟磕球变向技能......】

秦业掀开球队训练服，看了看自己隐约不可见的四块腹肌，不由的开始期待起来，八块腹肌也不是没可能！

嗯？不对！

18岁技能？可我只有十五岁啊，

喂，系统，是不是搞错了......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5081fb8299a9e4903e35a3f41d217dd1","author":"熊壹白","author_id":"","book_id":"7537329218858798105","book_name":"足球：全能型后腰，杀穿英超？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#004060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5596人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7537330332392292889","read_count":"5596","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"959751"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.9","serial_count":"462","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fff3c2746917b99870c6c39791403c00~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363200&x-signature=IXxK64347Q%2Ftwy4kItNx%2Bri%2F%2F%2BU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"316310983028916","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"71"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322193320A4E68A9A13EEB819E2ED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3341,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3280},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7547204016867033918","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还是挺不错的，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":17572204
